pattern_name: Prepositions of Time and Place (in, on, at)
pattern_name_ar: حروف الجر الزمانية والمكانية (in, on, at)
when_to_use: Use 'at' for precise points (exact times, specific locations like an address or building). Use 'on' for specific days/dates and surfaces. Use 'in' for longer time periods (months, years, seasons) and enclosed/larger spaces.
when_to_use_ar: استخدم at للنقاط الدقيقة (وقت محدد، مكان محدد). استخدم on لأيام/تواريخ محددة وللأسطح. استخدم in للفترات الزمنية الأطول (شهور، سنين، فصول) والأماكن المغلقة/الكبيرة.
why_arabic_speakers_struggle: Arabic often uses a single preposition (في) to cover many of the time/place meanings that English splits across at/on/in, so learners frequently default to 'in' for everything, or mix up which preposition pairs with which size of time unit.

examples.en: We have a meeting on Monday.

examples.ar: أنا عايش في العنوان ٤٥ شارع مين

examples.en: The keys are on the table, in the kitchen.
examples.structure: [The keys are] + [on] + [the table] + [in] + [the kitchen] — surface vs. enclosed space

common_errors.explanation: A specific clock time always uses 'at', never 'in'.

common_errors.wrong: We have a meeting at Monday.
common_errors.correct: We have a meeting on Monday.
common_errors.explanation: Days of the week use 'on', not 'at' (at is reserved for exact times, not whole days).
Years, months, and seasons use 'in', not 'on' — 'on' is for specific days/dates only.

practice_fill_blank.sentence: He works ___ a big company ___ the city center.
practice_fill_blank.hint: 'at' for a specific workplace, 'in' for a general area.

practice_fill_blank.sentence: Put the book ___ the shelf, ___ the living room.
practice_fill_blank.hint: 'on' for a surface, 'in' for an enclosed room.

quick_rule: AT = exact point (time or place). ON = specific day/date, or a surface. IN = longer time period (month/year/season) or enclosed/larger space. Zoom out from smallest (at) to biggest (in): at 6 PM → on Monday → in July → in 2026.
quick_rule_ar: AT = نقطة دقيقة. ON = يوم/تاريخ محدد، أو سطح. IN = فترة زمنية أطول أو مساحة مغلقة/كبيرة.
mnemonic: Think of ZOOMING OUT: AT a point → ON a day → IN a bigger period. Same logic for place: AT an address → ON a street → IN a city.
connect_to_speaking: Practice with your buddy: describe your weekly schedule using all three prepositions correctly — one sentence with 'at' (exact time), one with 'on' (a day), and one with 'in' (a month or season).
